site.name: Europe India Chamber of Commerce and Industry

hero.title: A practical bridge between Europe and India
hero.subtitle: EUICCI supports companies, founders, professionals, and investors looking to build real business links between Europe and India with clarity, trusted guidance, and practical support.

about.title: About EUICCI
about.p1: The Europe India Chamber of Commerce and Industry brings together people and organisations that want to work across European and Indian markets. EUICCI exists to make this journey clearer, more useful, and more grounded in real business needs.
about.p2: Cross border growth often sounds simple from the outside. In reality, it depends on context, trust, timing, introductions, and local understanding. EUICCI helps reduce that distance by offering practical guidance, business access, and consulting support that helps people move from interest to action.
about.p3: Based in Paris, with regular business presence in Brussels, EUICCI is positioned to support discussions that matter to companies operating in Europe while staying closely connected to India focused opportunities.

items.title: Strong economic logic
items.text: Europe and India offer real room for trade, service partnerships, technology exchange, and long term commercial growth.

items.title: Real demand for support
items.text: Many businesses want to explore the other market but do not know where to start, who to trust, or how to move in the right order.

items.title: Better outcomes through guidance
items.text: Good support at the start can save time, reduce avoidable mistakes, and help people focus on the opportunities that are worth pursuing.

services.title: Consulting and Advisory Services
services.intro: EUICCI offers value led support for people and businesses that need a serious partner for Europe India business engagement. The work is practical, human, and focused on outcomes that matter.

cards.title: Market entry support
cards.text: Help for companies exploring entry into Europe or India. This includes early market review, fit assessment, positioning guidance, and practical next steps.

cards.title: Business introductions
cards.text: Relevant introductions to potential partners, advisors, service providers, founders, and decision makers where there is a real basis for discussion.

cards.title: Growth consulting
cards.text: Support for companies shaping their cross border offer, refining their approach, and building a stronger path to traction in a new market.

cards.title: Founder advisory
cards.text: Direct support for founders who need clarity on opportunity, structure, go to market thinking, and local realities before making key moves.

cards.title: Strategic business support
cards.text: Help for organisations looking at partnerships, representation, commercial discussions, ecosystem access, and business development across borders.

cards.title: Cross cultural business guidance
cards.text: Support in understanding communication, pace, expectations, and decision making across European and Indian business environments.

offers.title: What EUICCI Can Help You Do
items: Assess whether Europe or India is the right next market
Find the right starting point instead of wasting months on the wrong one
Understand how to present your company in a more credible and locally relevant way
Connect with useful people instead of chasing cold and weak conversations
Prepare for meetings, delegations, visits, and commercial discussions
Clarify how your offer fits the realities of the target market
Strengthen business development efforts with local context and better structure
Build more confidence before making major time or money commitments

cards.title: Technology and digital services
cards.text: Software, AI, product, digital consulting, enterprise services, and technology led growth opportunities.

cards.title: Industry and manufacturing
cards.text: Industrial partnerships, supplier discussions, process improvement, service models, and expansion conversations.

cards.title: Energy and sustainability
cards.text: Clean energy, energy transition related services, sustainability focused business solutions, and industrial efficiency.

cards.title: Trade and market access
cards.text: Commercial access, distribution thinking, representation support, partner search, and business development.

cards.title: Startups and innovation
cards.text: Founder support, investor readiness thinking, partnerships, ecosystem access, and cross border scaling discussions.

cards.title: Professional services
cards.text: Advisory, legal coordination, market research support, strategic guidance, and relationship building.

advocacy.title: Advocacy
advocacy.p1: EUICCI supports better understanding of the practical issues that affect business engagement between Europe and India. Advocacy here means helping surface business needs, market realities, and common barriers that deserve clearer discussion.
advocacy.p2: This may include issues linked to market access, partnership building, business climate, trade conversations, startup collaboration, investment dialogue, and cross border working conditions.
advocacy.p3: EUICCI aims to represent business concerns with seriousness, balance, and a solution oriented mindset. The goal is not noise. The goal is useful dialogue that helps business move forward.

membership.title: Membership
membership.p1: EUICCI welcomes entrepreneurs, professionals, advisors, service providers, founders, and companies interested in stronger Europe India ties.
membership.p2: Membership is designed for people who want access to a serious network, business dialogue, relevant introductions, and opportunities to take part in useful exchanges.

partnerships.title: Sponsorship and Partnerships
partnerships.p1: EUICCI works with companies and organisations that want to support stronger business engagement between Europe and India.
partnerships.p2: Partnership opportunities may include event support, knowledge collaboration, visibility, introductions, ecosystem participation, and sector led initiatives.
partnerships.p3: For sponsorship, partnership, and business enquiries, contact contact@euicci.com

events.title: Business Dialogues and Meetings
events.p1: EUICCI supports business conversations that bring together professionals, founders, companies, and decision makers interested in Europe India opportunities.
events.p2: These may include roundtables, focused meetings, founder sessions, market discussions, delegation meetings, business introductions, and small group exchanges.
events.p3: Meetings may take place in Paris and Brussels, where EUICCI remains engaged in business activity on a regular basis.

leadership.title: President and Founder
leadership.name: Pankaj Thakur
leadership.bio1: Pankaj Thakur leads EUICCI with a clear purpose: to strengthen meaningful business links between Europe and India through practical support, better conversations, and trusted cross border engagement.
leadership.bio2: With more than a decade of international experience across Europe and Asia, he has worked with founders, growth stage businesses, and international teams on market expansion, business development, and commercial strategy.
leadership.bio3: Based in the Paris region and active in Brussels, Pankaj brings a strong international perspective with a practical style of execution. His work is rooted in clarity, relationship building, and helping people turn opportunity into concrete action.

board.title: Advisory Board and Expert Network
board.p1: EUICCI is designed to work with a growing circle of advisors, specialists, operators, and business leaders who bring practical knowledge across sectors and markets.
board.p2: This structure helps create stronger conversations, better insight, and more relevant support for members, partners, and business enquiries.
board.placeholder: Advisory board profiles and sector experts can be added here.

cards.title: Individual
cards.text: For professionals, consultants, and founders who want network access, discussions, and visibility.

cards.title: Business
cards.text: For companies looking for introductions, engagement support, and stronger Europe India business access.

cards.title: Strategic Partner
cards.text: For organisations seeking deeper collaboration, sponsorship visibility, and long term participation.

contact.title: Contact EUICCI
contact.text: Whether you are exploring a market, looking for a partner, preparing a visit, or seeking consulting support, EUICCI is ready to continue the conversation.

footer.line1: Europe India Chamber of Commerce and Industry
footer.line3: Membership, sponsorship, and business enquiries: contact@euicci.com
